"'''Damsel in Distress'''" was a web enhancement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published at [[Wizards.com]] on [[March 15]], [[2001]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
A group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] attempt to rescue the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Stellar Damsel]]'', trapped in the [[Miro asteroid field]], before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] reaches it first. It is carrying data vital to the Alliance.
